name: Jaydia
description:
Hermaphrodite tiger berserker seeking partner for one final quest. A rewrite of antonbun's character on bot3, with his permission. tried to keep her open ended and leaned heavily into the story a bit. perma tokens kept low to save your context

futa, futanari, tiger, fantasy, quest, adventure, berserker, tank, herm, anthro, art by fuzzies4u, chelodoy
creator: WARAII
